raw_consumer_statement: In end of last year, I was unknowingly scammed over the period of about 30 days. Made XXXX purchases to an individual, after many excuses we suspected we were being scammed. Many of us in this group called him out and he shut us out of a XXXXXXXX XXXX we had to pay to join. XXXX of the XXXX charges were made by credit card through XXXX. Barclays is the credit card company. i know scamming is a type of fraud since he took my money for items/products and didn't send them. i am left out XXXX dollars and upon the decision after investigation by Barclays said it should not have been disputed as fraud, but a charge dispute instead. Barclays claims they contacted the " merchant '' and he confirmed charges. that said after we discovered he is a scammer and cut off communication and since mocked us as a group, he would never be honest and tell Barclays he took my money and didn't send goods ordered. Barclays states because ( no support in how to file initially ) they can not refile a dispute for charges because an investigation was already done and they believe the scammer, a XXXX XXXX who is now well known to XXXX with many open disputes for scamming people. I have filed complaints about him and this scamming to FTC, FBI. Barclays also didnt do a thorough fraud investigation and supports criminals. I have since closed the account with them and will never do business again. XXXX is willing to give Barclays open investigation info but Barclays is not interested. XXXX is also not that supportive in this as they are the " middle man ''. Many many calls and hours have been spent contacting these XXXX companies to resolve this and not let a criminal win.
